subject: Windows Update fails with generic error code
description: Update downloads but fails install repeatedly; error code shown in Windows Update history.

ts_steps.title: Record hex error
ts_steps.action: Update history → failed KB → copy error code.

ts_steps.title: Windows Update troubleshooter
ts_steps.action: Settings → System → Troubleshoot → Other troubleshooters → Windows Update.

ts_steps.title: Disk cleanup
ts_steps.action: cleanmgr system files Windows Update Cleanup.

ts_steps.title: In-place repair
ts_steps.action: Same-edition Windows 11 ISO setup keep files and apps.

ts_steps.title: WSUS check
ts_steps.action: If managed updates — confirm KB not declined.

internal_information: Component store, AV lock, low disk, bad delta.
